error_signature: callback URI/Redirect URL not using https
title: Callback URI not configured with HTTPS in Docker
symptom: The callback URI for OAuth in n8n is not using HTTPS, causing connection issues when trying to authenticate with social media accounts.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker environment
not_this_if: Callback URI is correctly set with HTTPS
root_cause: The issue arises when the Docker compose file does not correctly set the environment variables for the n8n instance, specifically the FQDN without HTTPS, leading to incorrect callback URLs.
fix_steps: Open the Docker compose file for your n8n setup
Ensure the N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL and WEBHOOK_URL are set to include 'https://'
Restart the n8n Docker container to apply changes
agent_instruction: Update the Docker compose file to include 'https://' in the N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL and WEBHOOK_URL, then restart the container.
